events.appearance_notes: Observed event; On a road, a bus drives to the right road.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 7.0s, on a road, a bus drives to the right road.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Several pedestrians walked to the left from the right road, and two buses on the left drove to the right road.
events.event_text: From 7.0s to 31.4s, several pedestrians walked to the left from the right road, and two buses on the left drove to the right road.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Several pedestrians walked out of the building and walked to the left. Two buses on the left road drove to the right road, followed by two cars.
events.event_text: From 31.4s to 60.0s, several pedestrians walked out of the building and walked to the left. Two buses on the left road drove to the right road, followed by two cars.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A black car drove to the right road, several pedestrians were walking on the road, and several vehicles were driving to the right road.
events.event_text: From 60.0s to 125.2s, a black car drove to the right road, several pedestrians were walking on the road, and several vehicles were driving to the right road.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A truck drove to the right road and then stopped on the side of the road. A bus behind it drove to the right road, followed by a car.
events.event_text: From 125.2s to 130.5s, a truck drove to the right road and then stopped on the side of the road. A bus behind it drove to the right road, followed by a car.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The truck reversed and stopped in front of the building. Then a man got off the truck and a bus drove to the right road.
events.event_text: From 130.5s to 151.0s, the truck reversed and stopped in front of the building. Then a man got off the truck and a bus drove to the right road.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Then the man opened the trunk of the truck, unloaded the goods, and then pulled the goods and walked to the left. During this period, several vehicles passed by the road.
events.event_text: From 151.0s to 258.4s, then the man opened the trunk of the truck, unloaded the goods, and then pulled the goods and walked to the left. During this period, several vehicles passed by the road.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A bus drives from the left to the right road, followed by several vehicles and several pedestrians walking back and forth on the road.
events.event_text: From 258.4s to 298.0s, a bus drives from the left to the right road, followed by several vehicles and several pedestrians walking back and forth on the road.
